The Celastraceae family is composed of approximately 98 genera and over 1,000 species, with Feuilleea daulensis being one of the lesser-known species within this group. Feuilleea daulensis is native to certain regions and is a type of shrub or small tree. Its classification serves as a means of organizing and understanding the relationships between different plant species within the Celastraceae family.
